page_metadata.biotools__summary: Read mapper for high-throughput DNA sequencing reads, in particular reads from 100 nt to hundreds of nucleotides, and for large edit distance between sequencing read and match in the reference genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Read mapper for high-throughput DNA sequencing reads, in particular reads from 100 nt to hundreds of nucleotides, and for large edit distance between sequencing read and match in the reference genome.
